MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-25-621796 WITH CASE CGC-25-621771
Off Calendar Apr-22-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANTS JONNA CORPORATION, INC. SUED HEREIN AS JONNA CORPORATION INC., DOING BUSINESS AS PREMIER RECYCLE, AND CRISTIAN REYES' MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-25-621796 WITH CASE CGC-25-621771.

The unopposed motion of Jonna Corporation, Inc. and Cristian Ricardo Reyes for consolidation of Peake v. Jonna Corp. et al., No. CGC-25-621771, and Khuu v. Reyes et al, No. CGC-25-621796, is granted for all purposes. Peake v. Jonna Corp. will be the lead case.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling.

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (301/CVA)
